creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Apparently "CONFIGURE_ARGS= ---without-jpl" 
from port Makefile gets ignored
and configure fails to find Java includes
(gets stuck on javavm)

How-To-Repeat: 
Compile swi-pl with openjdk6/7 installed.

* Package jpl
